betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Fusion Reactor Attachments§f enhance fusion capabilities.

§bCoupler§f Function:§f
• Converts outgoing plasma to §bKyE§f
• Powers additional tori (fusion vessels)
• §cRequired§f when fuel combinations need more ignition energy than 4 Klystrons provide

§eHigh-Tier Fuels:§f
Some plasma types (DHC, Stellar) require >4 MKyU/t:
• Single reactor can't power them
• Coupler chains reactors together
• First vessel's plasma powers second vessel's Klystrons

§aTip:§f Plan Coupler setups before attempting DHC or Stellar plasma.
